prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent website section illustration
Primary request: three stacked answer cards fanning downward, a rounded violet plus badge attached to the front card, and a small glowing lightbulb spark in the upper right to suggest the simple first pass
Style/medium: polished bitmap illustration, rounded toy-like forms, subtle 3D depth, soft bevels, premium app-store illustration vibe, gentle realism rather than flat iconography
Composition/framing: centered isolated cluster, fully visible silhouette, generous transparent padding, no crop
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting from upper left, warm amber contact shadow below
Color palette: warm cream paper cards, charcoal UI lines, violet accent badge, soft golden bulb glow
Materials/textures: matte paper cards, rounded plastic badge, soft glassy lightbulb
Background: transparent
Constraints: transparent background; no text; no watermark; no border; no frame; keep the object compact and readable at small size
Avoid: flat SVG icon look, outline-only shapes, clutter, cropped edges
